description: May and Garner rush to Skye, who is triggering vibrations while asleep. Garner calmly provides psychological support, helping Skye regain control of her powers, while May coordinates the rest of the team to give them space. Skye wakes, but the event leaves everyone unsettled about the safety of her abilities.

transcript.line: Skye, you need to wake up. Skye!
You're doing this. You're shaking the room. You need to stop.
No, no. It's good. It's good. It's stopping.
